# Proverbs 11

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

## Verses (31)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Scales of deceit are hated by the Lord, but a true weight is his delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | When pride comes, there comes shame, but wisdom is with the quiet in spirit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The righteousness of the upright will be their guide, but the twisted ways of the false will be their destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Wealth is of no profit in the day of wrath, but righteousness keeps a man safe from death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The righteousness of the good man will make his way straight, but the sin of the evil-doer will be the cause of his fall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The righteousness of the upright will be their salvation, but the false will themselves be taken in their evil designs. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | At the death of an upright man his hope does not come to an end, but the hope of the evil-doer comes to destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The upright man is taken out of trouble, and in his place comes the sinner. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | With his mouth the evil man sends destruction on his neighbour; but through knowledge the upright are taken out of trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | When things go well for the upright man, all the town is glad; at the death of sinners, there are cries of joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | By the blessing of the upright man the town is made great, but it is overturned by the mouth of the evil-doer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | He who has a poor opinion of his neighbour has no sense, but a wise man keeps quiet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He who goes about talking of others makes secrets public, but the true-hearted man keeps things covered. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | When there is no helping suggestion the people will have a fall, but with a number of wise guides they will be safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | He who makes himself responsible for a strange man will undergo much loss; but the hater of such undertakings will be safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | A woman who is full of grace is honoured, but a woman hating righteousness is a seat of shame: those hating work will undergo loss, but the strong keep their wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The man who has mercy will be rewarded, but the cruel man is the cause of trouble to himself. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The sinner gets the payment of deceit; but his reward is certain who puts in the seed of righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | So righteousness gives life; but he who goes after evil gets death for himself. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | The uncontrolled are hated by the Lord, but those whose ways are without error are his delight | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Certainly the evil-doer will not go free from punishment, but the seed of the upright man will be safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Like a ring of gold in the nose of a pig, is a beautiful woman who has no sense. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | The desire of the upright man is only for good, but wrath is waiting for the evil-doer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | A man may give freely, and still his wealth will be increased; and another may keep back more than is right, but only comes to be in need. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | He who gives blessing will be made fat, but the curser will himself be cursed. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | He who keeps back grain will be cursed by the people; but a blessing will be on the head of him who lets them have it for a price. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | He who, with all his heart, goes after what is good is searching for grace; but he who is looking for trouble will get it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | He who puts his faith in wealth will come to nothing; but the upright man will be full of growth like the green leaf. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | The troubler of his house will have the wind for his heritage, and the foolish will be servant to the wise-hearted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | The fruit of righteousness is a tree of life, but violent behaviour takes away souls. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | If the upright man is rewarded on earth, how much more the evil-doer and the sinner! | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
